paragraphs: I’m a DevOps and cloud enthusiast who believes real learning comes from real systems. I build, test, break, and fix things constantly—and document what I learn through the process.
hashwithharsh started as a random place to dump my notes… somehow it turned into something I’m actually proud of.
Lately, I’ve been spending most of my time with AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, and GitHub Actions. If there’s a way to automate something, I’m on it.
